hero.title3: It is how you show up.
hero.desc: At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, we build a plan that fits your hair type, your lifestyle, and your goals.
hero.qa1A: Yes. Many types can be slowed, improved, or managed.
hero.qa2A: First-line: minoxidil and finasteride under medical advice.
hero.qa3A: Most treatments need 3-6 months of consistency.

causes.desc: Hair loss is not one single condition. It is a symptom with many causes.

treatments.title: Our Treatment Menu
treatments.desc: Evidence-based solutions for every type of hair loss
treatments.tr1Desc: Core option for early pattern loss

faq.q1: Can hair loss be reversed naturally?
faq.a1: Sometimes. If linked to temporary triggers like stress, it may improve. Genetic loss needs medical treatment.
faq.a2: 3 to 6 months for visible change, sometimes longer.
faq.q3: Is PRP good for hair loss?
faq.a3: Widely used for thinning hair and early-stage loss.
faq.q4: What happens if I stop minoxidil?
faq.a5: Effective but can have side effects. Requires medical supervision.
faq.q6: When do I need a transplant?
faq.a6: When follicles are no longer active in an area.
